items.name: logo
items.description: Displays the logo of the NavigationHeader.ReactNode

items.name: mobileMenuIcon
items.description: Icon displayed on the left of the NavigationHeader when viewport is less than md.ReactNode

items.name: mobileMenuFitContent
items.description: Set mobile menu to fit content instead of full screen.boolean

items.name: sticky
items.description: Sets the Root to top sticky.boolean

items.name: onSkipToMainAction
items.description: Callback to manage focus when skipping to main content (only available when navigating with keyboard).(() => void)

items.name: contained
items.description: Add a max-width to the Root container.boolean

items.name: fullWidth
items.description: Make the Root container full width. Takes precedence over contained propboolean

items.name: megaMenuTriggerMode
items.description: Mega menu trigger behavior (click or hover)."click""hover"

items.name: subHeader
items.description: Secondary header content below main navigation.ReactNode

items.name: burgerMd
items.description: Shows burger menu on tablet breakpoint (md: 768-1279px).boolean

slots.note: Slots are not reliably extractable from current MD/index sources.

notes: Accessibility terms are present in the docs. Validate exact behavior before production use.

token_bindings.note: Use semantic-token-map.json and component primitive contracts for HTML styling.

fallback_policy.reason: Component has at least one registered primitive contract.
